statement: In every magma, Equation 150 (`x = y * ((z * w) * u)`) implies Equation 1240 (`x = x * (((y * x) * x) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0112
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y x) x) z))
